chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D- 853 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 15.7.2025 Mr.Zulqarnain Talpur, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr.Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl. A.G Sindh Mr.Irfan Ali Talpur, Asst. P.G Sindh ********** Progress report received from the trial Court reflects that Charge has been framed a back on 28.3.2025 and the matter was fixed for evidence on several dates but could not be proceeded with due to the absence of representation on behalf of the accused/petitioner. Learned counsel for the Petitioner undertakes that matter would be proceeded without undue delay and seeks disposal of instant petition, with directions to the learned trial Court for expeditious conclusion of the trial. The learned A.P.G does not oppose such proposal. Under such circumstances, by consent the petitioner is disposed of, with directions to the trial Court to proceed with the trial expeditiously and conclude the same without undue delay, preferably within a period of three months. JUDGE JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
